name: Associated Banc-Corp Depositary Shares each representing a 1/40th interest in a share of 5.875% Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series E
summary: Associated Banc-Corp Depositary Shares represent fractional interests in preferred stock, specifically Series E. These shares offer a non-cumulative perpetual dividend. Associated Banc-Corp is headquartered in Green Bay, Wisconsin.
